LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-16-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 437C, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Continued To Mar-30-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 437C.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
